draftNote: 1 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Mr_Meat31 (midlane→offlane).

coaching.headline: You won three lanes and lost the map — your ahead lanes kept skipping the objective fights, so kills never became objectives. Objectives 4.5k-43k.
coaching.team: Lane wasn't the problem: Sparrow (favored, yours all game), The Fey mid and Steel support all won outright. The problem was that your ahead players were never AT the fights that decided it. At 14.6m two winning lanes (Iggy, Sparrow) sat out the fight you lost; at 18.3m your ahead mid was absent; at 27.5m it was a bad trade with two winning lanes nowhere near it. The 23m fight you even opened a body down (The Fey had died 39s earlier). Sparrow's line says it all — 5/6/1, one assist the entire game means he farmed a side lane while objectives went 4.5k-43k against you. Add no healer drafted into their Phase, and the objective war was lost before it started. Two fixes: when your lane is ahead, group on the objective the moment your spike is up — and draft some sustain or anti-dive so you can actually hold those fights.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Three won lanes never converged — your ahead players kept farming while the team contested objectives a body or two short, and you lost the neutral war 4.5k-43k. Bring the won lanes to the prize as a five, and draft a healer or anti-dive support so the fights you take hold up.

perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: Sparrow won lane outright (favored vs Revenant) and your spikes were on time (Vanquisher ~25m, Imperator ~36m) — but 5/6/1 with one assist all game is the whole loss in a line: the macro flagged you alive-and-ahead but absent from the 14.6m fight while objectives went 10-22 and towers 3-10. The moment your Vanquisher is up, shove and group; a won carry lane that never joins the objective fights doesn't win the game.
perPlayer.16f28434-561f-4f23-9454-40321f4a1ef3: Iggy offlane, 0/5/3 into their Murdock (10/4/5) — favored on paper but you never got a completed-item spike and got run over, and at 14.6m and 18.3m you were the ahead lane that didn't rotate to the fight. When you can't trade with the bully across from you, concede farm, play safe, and group with the team instead of dying in side lane.
perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Steel support, 0/7/7 and team-low 8.3k — you won the Phase lane, but the draft brought no sustain into their Phase healer and the team never answered it. At 25.5m you were the ahead lane sitting out a fight the team lost. As the lead, call the group earlier: this comp needed a healer or anti-dive, and the won lanes needed to converge on the objectives you were losing.
perPlayer.7c8ab99c-31c5-4ea5-a6fa-e0d6417c3f1b: The Fey mid, 4/5/5 — yours vs Renna with your Wraith Leggings spike ~19m. You held your end up, but you were flagged ahead-and-absent at 18.3m and 27.5m, and the 23.1m fight opened a body down after you died 39s earlier — so the team kept fighting without their winning mid. Use those ahead windows to shove and rotate onto the objective, not to keep pushing a side wave.
perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Khaimera jungle, 7/7/5 — the Countess matchup tilted theirs from 15 minutes, and with objectives going 4.5k-43k the jungle had to set and contest more of them. You were in the fights, but they were the wrong ones — fight on top of Fangtooth/Prime so the kills buy the objective. Build note: no armor (Overlord/Basilisk/Rapture) again — finish that core so you survive the late fights.

threats: Chain-CC risk (1 hard-CC abilities, ~0.8s of lockdown): Countess Feast (suppress 0.75s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Heal-stacking: Phase. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — you brought none.
Dive threat on your backline: Countess. Assign peel for your carry and ward your flanks.
synergy: Your engage/CC: Iggy & Scorch Inferno (knockback). Your kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Bramble Patch slow → Harvest Nettles stacks → Untamed Growth DoT → Fly Trap pull ult
ourKits.winCondition: Fly Trap a clumped team and detonate AoE on the pull
ourKits.passive: takedowns spawn growths + grant move speed
ourKits.playWith: engage that clumps for her Fly Trap
ourKits.playAgainst: spread out vs the pull; she's squishy — dive her

ourKits.combo: Oil Spill → Molotov ignite → Flame Turret → Inferno knockback ult
ourKits.winCondition: layer fire zones on a choke/objective and burn the team
ourKits.playWith: CC that holds enemies in his fire
ourKits.playAgainst: don't fight in his zones — flank; kill the turret, dive him

ourKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
ourKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
ourKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
ourKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

ourKits.combo: Bull Rush knockback → Force Shield wall → Shield Slam knockup+stun ult, Shield Bash %hp
ourKits.winCondition: peel the carry with walls/knockups or engage with Shield Slam
ourKits.playWith: a carry he can wall for and peel
ourKits.playAgainst: his Force Shield blocks projectiles — reposition around it; bait Shield Slam

ourKits.combo: Ambush leap → Unleash AS → Cull stun, Invigorate to cleanse+heal
ourKits.winCondition: stick on one target, stun with Cull and out-sustain via Spirit Regen
ourKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his Cull stun
ourKits.playAgainst: ANTI-HEAL is mandatory — it guts his whole kit; kite the leap and CC through Invigorate

enemyKits.combo: Scar mark → Obliterate homing missiles → Reckoning 1v1 realm ult
enemyKits.winCondition: Reckoning a target into the Nether Realm and crit them down 1v1
enemyKits.playWith: a team to clean up if his 1v1 stalls
enemyKits.playAgainst: the ult is a 1v1 — peel the realmed ally can't help, so don't be caught alone; he's crit-reliant early-weak

enemyKits.combo: Shadow Slip in → Eventide → Blade Siphon → Feast suppress ult, Haemorrhage true-damage
enemyKits.winCondition: Feast-suppress a squishy and delete them with true-damage burst
enemyKits.passive: two-ability hits apply a %max-HP true-damage bleed
enemyKits.playWith: a team to clean up after her pick
enemyKits.playAgainst: Feast is her whole engage — bait it / peel; she's fragile, punish the recast window

enemyKits.combo: Static Trap root → Buckshot → Hot Pursuit AS → Long Arm of the Law global snipe
enemyKits.winCondition: trap for the root, then out-range with Shots Fired and finish with the global ult
enemyKits.passive: every 5th basic is a long-range bonus shot
enemyKits.playWith: frontline/peel to protect his low mobility
enemyKits.playAgainst: almost no escape — engage past the trap and he dies

enemyKits.combo: Soulfire waves → Mortal Coil pull-zone → Stupor orb → Abyssal Rift zone
enemyKits.winCondition: zone a fight with Mortal Coil + ult and chunk from range
enemyKits.passive: consumes essences from kills for power
enemyKits.playWith: frontline to hold enemies in her zones
enemyKits.playAgainst: fragile and reliant on her zones — flank/dive around the telegraphs

enemyKits.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
enemyKits.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
enemyKits.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
enemyKits.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
enemyKits.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over timeline majors (older film — no tower times; Fang/Prime/Orb only); itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
